name: 80 MG Telmisartan And Hydrochlorothiazide Tablets IP
about: 80 MG Telmisartan And Hydrochlorothiazide Tablets IP are a combination medication used to treat high blood pressure. Telmisartan belongs to a class of drugs called angiotensin receptor blockers, which help to relax blood vessels and decrease blood pressure. Hydrochlorothiazide is a diuretic that helps to remove excess fluid from the body, which also helps to lower blood pressure. These tablets are solid in form and are manufactured in India as general medicines. The recommended dosage for this medication is 80 mg, and it should be stored in a dry place.

faq.a: These tablets are used to treat high blood pressure.
